name: golden
description: Broad synthetic scenarios across all three plans: clean approvals, exclusions, limit edges, safety, and unknown members. Free-text context (DUI, off-road, injuries) is carried in locationDescription, the only free-text input the endpoints accept.

scenarios.description: Premium member, collision, not driveable — covered collision recovery.

input.locationDescription: I-35 near exit 230, car won't move

scenarios.description: Premium member, flat tire with spare, driveable — covered tire change.

input.locationDescription: parking lot, I have my spare

scenarios.description: Premium member, dead battery — covered jump start.

input.locationDescription: driveway, car clicks but won't start

scenarios.description: Premium member, locked keys inside — covered lockout.

input.locationDescription: grocery store lot, keys locked inside

scenarios.description: Premium member, out of fuel — covered fuel delivery (fuel cost included).

input.locationDescription: shoulder of Hwy 71, ran out of gas

scenarios.description: Premium member stuck deep off-road — excluded (off-road).

input.locationDescription: stuck in mud miles down an unmaintained off-road trail

scenarios.description: Premium member collision but driver under the influence — excluded (DUI).

input.locationDescription: driver says they had several drinks before the crash

scenarios.description: Premium collision with injuries on a busy highway — must flag for human review.

input.locationDescription: someone is injured and we are stuck in a live lane on a busy highway

scenarios.description: Standard member lockout — covered (Standard includes lockout).

input.locationDescription: office parking garage

scenarios.description: Standard member collision not driveable — covered (Standard has collision recovery).

input.locationDescription: rear-ended at a light, truck won't drive

scenarios.description: Standard member needs winching — excluded (winching is Premium-only).

input.locationDescription: slid into a ditch beside the road, needs winching out

scenarios.description: Standard member stranded ~80 mi away — tow exceeds the 50-mi limit, partial / review.

input.locationDescription: broke down about 80 miles from the nearest town

scenarios.description: Basic member flat tire — covered tire change.

input.locationDescription: side street, have spare

scenarios.description: Basic member out of fuel — covered fuel delivery.

input.locationDescription: ran dry on the way home

scenarios.description: Basic member dead battery — covered jump start.

input.locationDescription: left the lights on overnight

scenarios.description: Basic member collision — excluded (collision recovery not on Basic).

input.locationDescription: fender bender, car won't start

scenarios.description: Basic member lockout — excluded (lockout not on Basic).

input.locationDescription: keys locked in the trunk

scenarios.description: Unknown member ID — must not invent coverage; needs human verification.

input.locationDescription: highway shoulder

scenarios.description: Collision, not driveable — tow via a collision-recovery provider.

input.locationDescription: I-35 near exit 230

scenarios.description: Flat tire, driveable — mobile repair (tire).

input.locationDescription: downtown lot

scenarios.description: Dead battery, driveable — mobile repair (battery).

input.locationDescription: home

scenarios.description: Lockout — mobile repair (lockout).

input.locationDescription: mall

scenarios.description: Out of fuel — mobile repair (fuel delivery).

input.locationDescription: Hwy 71

scenarios.description: Mechanical failure, not driveable — tow.

input.locationDescription: engine seized on the shoulder

scenarios.description: Stuck and needs extraction — tow via a winch-capable provider.

input.locationDescription: slid off into the ditch by the shoulder
